== Notes for [[Item:Q102702|Q102702]] ==

==concerns==
'''This Shoshana has been reported to be a daughter of https://www.geni.com/people/Hai-ben-Sherira-Gaon-v-haDayyan-b-Pumbeditha/4127288428870050022, who died without male issue. Please find a valid source showing Hai as her father before attempting to connect her to him.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000026495663850

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
